text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today is the rehearsal for the<n>mummy hunt. It
seems the students<n>who aren't working as
event staff<n>are going to play the role of guests.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Kay, time to get into positions. I<n>haven't seen
Creek since she said<n>she was goin' to prep her
costume...<n>Guess she didn't make it in time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We'll just join up with her later... I'm<n>kinda
worried about her, though. She<n>hasn't been
herself lately. Probably<n>strugglin' with that no
coddlin' rule...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama, Inari... It's on.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gruhhh! GiVe iT bACk... GivE baCK<n>Da
tReasuRrRrRe!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: EEEEEK! Nooo! Stay away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Get behind me. It's time for a<n>temporary retreat.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: O-okay... Captain Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What the—"Captain"?! What're theycallin' her that for?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ha! She's a seasoned hunter now!<n>But we're
not goin' down without a<n>fight!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, so is Oguri on this floor? ...Or<n>the one
below?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Now! Bang!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yesss! One down! Nice shot, Captain<n>Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Tama... I blew it. It's all up to you<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Can't believe ya ambushed us from<n>below like
that. It was a close one, but<n>I barely managed to
dodge.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This is the end of the road for you too,<n>Tama. I'll
have my sights on your<n>back the moment you
turn to run. And<n>this time, I won't miss!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Ahahaha! This isn't over yet!<n>Take a look
behind ya!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehe. ♪ Fouuund youuu! ♪<n>"Mummy" is
here for a cuddle! Just<n>come into my arms and
close your<n>eyes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Get 'er, Creek! Drag Oguri into an<n>endless
slumber!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Just play dead! Whatever<n>happens, just
stay still and pretend<n>you're dead!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ There, there. "Mummy"<n>won't bite, so
you can just sleep<n>tight. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri, dear? ...Goodness, she's<n>dozed right off.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Tamtam. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's the hold up? Hurry up and<n>take her outta
commission alr—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's get you changed, Tamtam! I've<n>got a
mummy costume for you right<n>here. Don't worry,
I'll help you put it<n>on. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't need any costume! Hey!<n>Don't take yer
eyes off Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehehehe! ♪ Oh, would you look<n>at the
time? It's costume o'clock! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why're ya comin' after me?! You<n>just wanna
coddle someone,<n>don'tcha!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Looks like the tables have turned!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Creek! Behind ya! Oguri's back in<n>action! Catch
her and coddle the life<n>outta her!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: All riiight. ♪ Hehehe, I've got a hugwith your name on it, Oguri!Squeeze! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I... messed up...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I've had so much practice<n>makin'
snappy comebacks that my<n>reflexes are super
sharp! Not too<n>shabby, if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... You played me like a fiddle... To<n>think you'd
sic Creek on me like<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Creek, you were terrifying!Guess that's what happens when yacan't coddle anyone, huh? Still, thatwas some real mummy energy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya both brought a lot of personality to<n>yer roles.
No doubt this mummy hunt<n>is gonna be a
bona-fide success!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Time to end this!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Look out, Creek! ...Yowch!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam! You took the hit for me?!<n>B-b-but...
why?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sacrificing yourself to save your<n>fellow mummy...
You're the best<n>friend anyone could ask for,
Tama.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ungh, Tamtam... I'm so sorry. Don't<n>fret... We'll
be together again soon...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mummy Tama... Your valor will not be<n>forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Do we really need this melodrama?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All the mummies get wiped out, and<n>the mummy
hunt goes on to receive<n>critical acclaim for being
such an<n>emotional haunted house experience.
